stories.title: Package README.md
acceptanceCriteria: packages/render-sdk/README.md: what-it-is, install (+ optional peer deps @remotion/renderer / @remotion/lambda), quickstart for BOTH server and lambda

Quickstart imports match the real exports exactly: RenderSdk + waitForCompletion from '@remocn/render-sdk', RenderServer from '@remocn/render-sdk/server', RenderLambda from '@remocn/render-sdk/lambda'
Public surface table lists RenderSdk methods (start/getState/getUrl/download/waitForCompletion) with their real signatures
Link to the docs site; prose is English

stories.title: Fumadocs pages + nav
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/docs/content/docs/{index.mdx, public-surface.mdx, adapters.mdx, transport-recipes.mdx, provisioning.mdx, state-store.mdx, limitations.mdx} each with valid frontmatter (title + description)
Create apps/docs/content/docs/meta.json with pages in order: index, public-surface, adapters, transport-recipes, provisioning, state-store, limitations
Remove the starter apps/docs/content/docs/test.mdx
index.mdx covers the overview + responsibility boundary (where Remotion provisioning ends and the SDK begins; what is out of scope)
public-surface.mdx documents start/getState/getUrl/download/waitForCompletion with the real RenderInput/RenderState/WaitOptions types
adapters.mdx documents RenderServer (ServerConfig/ServerOptions) and RenderLambda (LambdaConfig/LambdaOptions) + a server-vs-lambda comparison table + a unified getUrl behavior table

stories.title: Recipes (transport + provisioning) + home page
acceptanceCriteria: transport-recipes.mdx covers a Next.js POST route (start), a GET poll route (getState), a GET download route (download), and a browser poll loop
provisioning.mdx covers bundle (server build step) and deploySite/deployFunction (lambda) as explicitly the CONSUMER's job, not the SDK's
state-store.mdx documents the StateStore SPI + InMemoryStore default + how to swap to Redis/SQL
limitations.mdx lists limitations (getUrl valid only when done; publicUrl serves nothing by itself) + out-of-scope (no cancel/list/delete/upload, no HTTP client)
apps/docs/app/(home)/page.tsx replaces the 'Hello World' starter with SDK-describing copy
Snippets do NOT document out-of-scope features (cancel/list/delete/upload)

stories.title: Build green + snippet/type accuracy
acceptanceCriteria: bun --filter docs build is green with the new pages and nav renders in order

Every code snippet uses the FINAL type/config names from PRs 03-07 (no drift: Codec/RenderInput/RenderState/WaitOptions/ServerConfig/ServerOptions/LambdaConfig/LambdaOptions/RenderSdk/RenderServer/RenderLambda/waitForCompletion/InMemoryStore)
No snippet references a non-existent export or a wrong field name
code-reviewer confirms snippet/type accuracy vs the shipped API
